title: Luffy Finds the Real Enemy
description: On pages 9–12, luffy finds the real enemy as mr. 3 tightens his plan around the captured crew, forcing Luffy and Usopp to fight through smoke, wax, and Baroque Works tricks.
scene: Luffy Finds the Real Enemy. Mr. 3 tightens his plan around the captured crew, forcing Luffy and Usopp to fight through smoke, wax, and Baroque Works tricks. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Once I cut off my feet,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Would you like to help me crush these bastards?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Y... your feet!? You're going to cut off your own feet!? Are you joking!? What do you think you're saying in a time like this!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: It's because we're in a time like this that I'm saying it.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Why, what will you do?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What do you mean what? It's useless! Even if we were to do that and get down from here, they'd catch us again in an instant!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Can't know until you try, y'know?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Standing here is only going to bring us certain death. Might as well go down and painfully struggle down to our very last breath...!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: There's no reason to die quietly at the hands of these weaklings.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Am I right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What're you talking about...! Have you lost it!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Hmph... of course he's not serious, can't you see? There's no way he could ever do such a thing!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: It's nothing more than a bluff!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Gaba- Bababa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What a bold little one you are...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: even I was on the verge of losing my will to fight...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll gladly follow along,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: With that spirit of yours!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: WHA...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Y-you're joking, right!? How do you expect to fight without both your legs!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Who knows.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But I plan to win.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I would

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Click here to see the

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: What's with these fools!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: They're insane!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Princess VIVI, are you prepared to never give up and die?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Wait for me! I'll fight too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Viv!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: sure thing.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Then let's do this!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I don't know what you think you can accomplish but I'll just have to kill you all!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: RI-

summary: This part centers on luffy finds the real enemy, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
